name: sysFilterAddNamespace
title: sysFilterAddNamespace
description: Adds a namespace to the variable filter. If no filterName is given, the namespace is added to the default filter.

parameters.name: namespace
parameters.description: The namespace to add. The existence of the namespace is not checked, and adding a namespace that is not defined is not an error. If the namespace gets defined after it is added to the filter, it is affected by the filter normally.
